name: Legion of Honor

photo_credit.author: Fine Arts Museums of San Francisco (FAMSF)

summary_en: Archived materials document the California Palace of the Legion of Honor, from a 1924 Pacific Coast Architect feature and 1925 Board of Park Commissioners minutes on the building's operations to Fine Arts Museums board records and a 1947 city appropriation ordinance naming its dedicated fund, plus Recreation and Park event listings for concerts and performances at the Lincoln Park site. It is operated by the Fine Arts Museums (FAM), whose FY2025 budget line totaled $24M. The place file records no contracts naming it.
